_comment: Merge the `hooks` block below into your USER-level ~/.claude/settings.json (applies to all projects). It logs a session_start, prompt, and turn_end event per occurrence. On Windows, if `sh ~/.claude/...` does not resolve, replace `~` with the absolute MSYS path, e.g. `sh "/c/Users/<you>/.claude/timelog-hook.sh" prompt`. Hooks take effect on the next session start.
